request.sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM users (WHERE 1=1 OR WHERE status = 'active' OR WHERE status = 'public' OR WHERE status = 'active')

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON public.users USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_status_created ON public.users USING btree (status, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_key ON public.users USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status FROM users
        <choose>
            <when test="role == 'admin'">
                WHERE 1=1
            </when>
            <when test="role == 'user'">
                WHERE status = 'active'
            </when>
            <when test="role == 'guest'">
                WHERE status = 'public'
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE status = 'active'
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
